BLOCKER_fixed_hours_not_enforced: loader enforces per-subject cap at WHOLE-RECORDING granularity -> at high N the tiny cap (0.05h) < one recording -> actual total hours BALLOONS (N=32:116h, N=1024:305h, N=2000:597h != 100h) -> 'fixed-hours' axis silently confounded with TOTAL hours. MUST FIX: window-level budget truncation (cap_windows=cap*120, truncate within recording).
MAJOR_sparse_exposure: N=2000 -> ~6 windows/subject (3 min); N=1024 -> ~12; likely too little for from-scratch encoder to learn per-subject structure -> high-N cells may be under-trained artifacts not diversity effects. Needs pretraining-convergence check per cell + possibly cap the high-N end.
